definitions: A humorous use of a word or phrase so as to suggest two or more of its meanings or the meaning of another word similar in sound; a pun.
A literary device that involves a word or phrase that has multiple meanings or that sounds like another word or phrase, used for humorous or rhetorical effect.
examples: The comedian's act was full of clever plays on words.
She appreciated the subtle play on words in the poem.
His speech included a witty play on words that made everyone laugh.
